question: Will Nickel price on the London Metal Exchange exceed 8000 USD/tonne on May 31, 2026?
reason: Nickel price on May 22, 2026, was $18,880 per tonne, significantly above $8,000.
evidence: Nickel price on May 22, 2026, was $18,880 per tonne, significantly above $8,000.
Goldman Sachs raised its 2026 average nickel price forecast to $18,500 per metric ton, citing tighter Indonesian supply.
Nickel prices have been rising due to reduced Indonesian mining quotas and sulfur shortages.
